fact: JMI is our technology partner in the Design, Architecture and Development of an intelligent energy management platform and a smart lighting energy management solution. These are hosted by JMI and offered as a SaaS solution to over twenty five active utility customers around the World.
Save energy and reduce costs by up to 40% with Property Smart Grid. (jeanmartin.com/products, retrieved July 14, 2026)

A client testimonial currently published on JMI's homepage (jeanmartin.com) and sales page (jeanmartin.com/sales) reads: 'The scalability of this solution will enable deployment to more than 1000 retail locations in the year to come.' The surrounding context (same testimonial block) references JMI's integration of Microsoft SharePoint 2010 with Microsoft Dynamics ERP & CRM and the JMI Hybrid model, confirming this is a real client quote about a JMI-delivered solution.

Currently, there are over 350 million daily users of products and services delivered by JMI. (Jean Martin Inc. company statement, repeated across multiple official PR Newswire press releases dated March 12, 2024; July 11, 2024; and July 16, 2024, and reflected on the live jeanmartin.com site as of the current live CB Insights page.)
Prior to starting JMI, Shawn was instrumental in implementing various Banking and Investment Banking products and solutions for organizations like Citigroup and Goldman Sachs.

GT Logistics bridges the gap between ground transportation companies, corporate travel departments, and retail passengers by providing the latest mobile, web, and telephony solutions, for every transportation market. (Source: https://www.jeanmartin.com/gt-logistics, live as of July 2026)
